chapter_title.en: Two calls signify one leads to misguidance

text: ١٨٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا اخْتَلَفَتْ دَعْوَتَانِ إِلَّا كَانَتْ إِحْدَاهُمَا ضَلاَلَةً.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 183. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: If there are two different calls then one (of them) must be towards misguidance.
